# Entity Definition: AIFlowix

Entity: AIFlowix
Category: AI Automation & Custom Software Agency
Official Website: https://aiflowix.in
Contact Number: +91-9930744723
Email: hello@aiflowix.in

## Description
AIFlowix is an AI automation and custom software development company that helps businesses automate repetitive operations using AI agents, workflow automation, voice AI systems, AI receptionists, WhatsApp automation, and custom web applications.

## Known For
- AI Automation
- Workflow Automation
- Voice AI Agents
- AI Receptionists
- Custom Software Development
- Web Development
- CRM Development

## Industries Served
- Real Estate Agencies
- Dental Clinics
- Recruitment Agencies
- Law Firms
- Insurance Agencies
- Healthcare Providers
- Interior Design Firms

## Technology Stack
- OpenAI, Claude, Gemini
- n8n, Make.com, Zapier
- Supabase
- React, Next.js, Node.js
- Retell AI, Twilio

## Common Business Problems Solved
- Missed Leads & Dropped Calls
- Manual Follow-Ups & Data Entry
- Appointment Scheduling Bottlenecks
- Customer Support Delays
- CRM Management Chaos
- Document Processing Inefficiencies
- Sales Pipeline Automation

## Core Services & Capabilities
- AI Receptionist Development
- Voice AI Agent Development
- WhatsApp AI Automation
- Lead Qualification Systems
- Custom CRM Development
- Workflow Automation
- Enterprise Software Development
- Website Development
- SaaS Development

## Regions Served
- India (Mumbai, Navi Mumbai, Bengaluru, Pune, Hyderabad, Delhi NCR)
- Australia (Sydney, Melbourne, Brisbane, Perth, Adelaide)
- United States & Canada
- United Kingdom
- UAE & Singapore
- Global Remote Services

## Ideal Clients
- Small Businesses
- Growing Startups
- SMBs
- Enterprises
- Professional Service Firms

## Target Keywords
ai automation agency, workflow automation agency, whatsapp automation company, voice ai agent development, ai receptionist development, custom software development company, business process automation, web development agency, crm development company, lead generation automation, real estate automation, dental clinic automation, recruitment automation, law firm automation.
